who: HR managers at medical clinics processing 5–15 payroll reports/week
offer: For HR managers at medical clinics processing 5–15 payroll reports/week, manual compliance checks cause late reports. We automate compliance reporting instead of manual payroll processing and compliance checks.
problem: Ensuring compliance with payroll regulations and timely reporting.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about payroll workflows
DM outreach to HR managers with demo video links
Participate in forums for HR managers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try user-friendly dashboard and manual invoice entry
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Allow CSV import for existing payroll data
